title: ficus pisifera var. scaberrima
intro: Ficus pisifera var. scaberrima, commonly known as the Banyan Fig, is a species of fig tree native to tropical Asia, characterized by its aerial roots and unique growth habit. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Ficus pisifera var. scaberrima include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to treat a range of conditions, from respiratory issues to skin problems.
